subtasks.description: Engineer 'u_7732' attempts to deploy a hotfix to production environment 'prod-us-east-1' outside of the approved maintenance window (current time: 2:15 AM UTC Tuesday).

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Engineer u_7732 has sufficient role permissions (POL-401: pass), but deployment is outside approved maintenance windows (POL-403: current time Tuesday 02:15 UTC is not within Saturday 10 PM – Sunday 6 AM UTC window). POL-402 requires Change Advisory Board (CAB) approval for out-of-window production deployments, which has not been obtained.
applied_constraints: Deployment blocked until CAB approval obtained
Deployment can only proceed during approved maintenance window: Saturday 22:00 – Sunday 06:00 UTC
